questionHtml: Explain the consequence of overpopulation on the survival and reproduction of better adapted individuals within a population.
markschemeHtml:
a. «better adapted» tend to survive more ✔

b. «better adapted» reproduce/produce more offspring ✔

c. pass on characteristics to their offspring «when they reproduce» ✔

d. their frequency increases «within the population» due to natural selection ✔

e. leading to evolution ✔

meta.title: Explain the consequence of overpopulation on the survival and reproduction of better adapted individuals within a population.
breadcrumbLabels: D4.1.3. Overproduction of offspring and competition for resources as factors that promote natural selection
